strategy.features: concatenated auth_a, auth_b and read_block0 features
strategy.sample_weighting: equal total weight for every group/class cell
strategy.blind_test: held-out group's Formal and Magic only

aggregate_with_repeated_test_appearances.prediction_count_note: Each transaction appears in five different 4|2 test folds.

final_all_groups_model.note: Trained and calibrated on all six groups; metrics are resubstitution/calibration, not blind-test evidence.
